assertions.evidence: '@type': 'Recipe' in RecipeJsonLd component with recipeIngredient, recipeInstructions, aggregateRating. Proper schema.org/Recipe implementation.
app/sitemap.ts with 'import { MetadataRoute } from "next"'. Correct location and API.
'export default async function sitemap(): Promise<MetadataRoute.Sitemap>' reads from getAllRecipes() async call.
No opengraph-image.tsx file. OG image is passed as a static URL in generateMetadata: images: [{ url: recipe.image, width: 1200, height: 630 }]. No ImageResponse or next/og usage.
